meaning: 微软提供的网络在线服务
examples: Years ago, it started its own online service, MSN.
It's still around, believe it or not, now rebranded as MSN TV.
You can use MSN, yahoo and other chat programs to chat in English.
The Abacus 2006 is a significant advance over the first generation of MSN Direct watches.
Other improvements include more memory and the inclusion of a year of MSN Direct service.
